Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Maria Majda's motion for judgment on the pleadings on the second cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress is granted without leave to amend. Dr. Majda is correct that negligent infliction of emotional distress does not lie on these facts and that the second cause of action is entirely duplicative of the first cause of action for dental malpractice. Dr. Majda is also correct that plaintiff Carol Canfield can recover emotional distress damages on the first cause of action if such damages are proved. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
